title: Enderfuge
description: Allows better efficiency of melting down your old armor/weapons.
body:
This mod adds an Enderfuge, which aims to improve the nugget output you get when you smelt down your armor/weapons.   As of 1.1.3 for 1.12+, we now require [CTD Core](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/ctd-core) to be installed along with Enderfuge.   Recipe:

   Note that this requires special fuel! Ender Pearls will burn for 1,600 ticks, Eyes of Ender will burn for 5,600, and End Crystals will burn for 25,000! A single operation will take 400 ticks. These all entirely configurable. Check your "config/ctd" folder!
